## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm lint` are green, code is `pnpm format`ted
- [ ] Changes have tests — concurrency- and security-sensitive paths (sync, secret gates, note IO) **must** have them
- [ ] `README.md` updated if a user-facing capability changed
- [ ] Significant design decision? Recorded as an ADR in `docs/adr/` (ADRs are immutable once accepted — supersede, don't edit)
